name: Family TV Planner
description: Shows a shared household calendar on Android TV, syncing events from Google, Outlook, and iOS. Voice commands add or modify events, while reminders appear as on‑screen alerts, keeping families coordinated without checking phones.

name: Local Gem Explorer
description: Explore unseen local spots from your couch: the app uses your phone’s location to surface nearby hidden restaurants, parks, art, and events, delivering short video tours and map navigation, letting you plan spontaneous outings directly from Android TV.

name: Local Live Lens
description: Local Live Lens turns your Android TV into a real‑time neighborhood window. By using your phone’s GPS, the app pulls live webcam streams, micro‑news bulletins, crowd density, weather updates, and event alerts from cafés, parks, streets, and local businesses within a configurable radius. You can browse feeds by category, set favorite spots, and receive push notifications for sudden changes like road closures or pop‑up markets. Features include an interactive map overlay, on‑screen chat for community comments, scheduled recordings, and privacy controls that let venues opt‑in or out. Ideal for tourists scouting routes, residents checking local vibes, or remote workers staying connected to their community.
expandedDescription: Local Live Lens turns your Android TV into a real‑time neighborhood window. By using your phone’s GPS, the app pulls live webcam streams, micro‑news bulletins, crowd density, weather updates, and event alerts from cafés, parks, streets, and local businesses within a configurable radius. You can browse feeds by category, set favorite spots, and receive push notifications for sudden changes like road closures or pop‑up markets. Features include an interactive map overlay, on‑screen chat for community comments, scheduled recordings, and privacy controls that let venues opt‑in or out. Ideal for tourists scouting routes, residents checking local vibes, or remote workers staying connected to their community.

name: Family Pulse Hub
description: A desktop hub that syncs family calendars, streams live neighborhood cams, and lets you organize photos, apps, and playlists on customizable shelves, using voice commands and gamified rewards to keep households coordinated, informed, and decluttered.

name: ZenNest
description: ZenNest syncs lights, sound, temperature, and aromatherapy to your mood and schedule, creating a personalized smart sanctuary. AI‑driven routines guide relaxation, focus, or sleep, while seamless voice and sensor control keep your home calm and responsive—all from one intuitive mobile app.

name: Silent Budget
description: A mobile app that auto‑categorizes spending from linked accounts, shows only net cash‑flow, and alerts only when you drift, so budgeting works in the background without manual entry.

name: Family Pulse
description: Family Pulse is a mobile hub that merges calendars, chores, meals, and location updates into a single AI‑driven daily briefing. It auto‑suggests task assignments, prompts grocery orders, and sends subtle reminders, keeping every member aware without endless group chats.

name: HoliPal
description: Personalized Holi Festival planning and sharing app, connecting users with local events, recipes, and traditional wear suggestions.

name: Festive Family Hub
description: A mobile AI hub that blends family scheduling, chores, meals, and location with cultural festival planning. It auto‑suggests tasks, grocery orders, and festive recipes, outfits, and local events, delivering daily briefings that keep households organized and celebration‑ready without endless chats.
